_doc: Phase 5 INSUFFICIENT_ACCESS path — when no usable tier is available, OR budgets are exhausted before any credible evidence is gathered, the run returns outcome=INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE with reason_code=INSUFFICIENT_ACCESS. It NEVER fabricates a pick to fill a data gap. Drives tools/orchestration.mjs::orchestrate.

cases.name: no usable tier (even baseline unavailable) -> INSUFFICIENT_ACCESS
budgets exhausted before any evidence -> INSUFFICIENT_ACCESS
